gates.name: Gate A
gates.details: Primary entry gate located near Parking P1. Handles general access and coordinates with the main taxi drop-off terminal. Opens exactly 2 hours prior to scheduled event kickoff.

gates.name: Gate B
gates.details: Conveniently located directly opposite the central Metro transit exit. Features heavy security checks and fast lane lanes.

gates.name: Gate C
gates.details: Located near the North Plaza, adjacent to the main Medical First Aid station.

gates.name: Gate D
gates.details: Located on the West side, designated as the primary Wheelchair Accessible Entrance.

food.details: Main food hub with 100% vegetarian options and Gluten-Free alternatives.
Arena Bites snack stand for quick bites and soft beverages.
Halal certified dynamic menu options on the upper deck.

medical.details: Main First Aid Station, staffed by certified EMTs throughout the event.
Secondary First Aid Station for upper-level fans.

elevators.name: Elevator 1
elevators.details: General lift serving lower level terraces.

elevators.name: Elevator 3
elevators.serves: Provides access to the Upper Concourse and Section 204

accessibility.restrooms: Section 204 and Section 220 have accessible stalls

sections.name: Section 204
sections.directions: To reach Section 204, take Elevator 3 (near Gate C/First Aid) to the Upper Concourse level, turn left, and Section 204 will be immediately visible next to Section 202.

sections.name: Section 104
sections.directions: Located on the Lower Concourse, near Gate A. Just walk straight from the entrance and turn right.

additionalLocations.name: Main Stage
additionalLocations.details: Centrally located stadium stage area for concerts and special events. Access strictly requires a field-access VIP wristband.

additionalLocations.name: Parking P1
additionalLocations.details: Main vehicle parking area located outside Gate A. Has reserved spots for premium passes and tournament sponsors.

additionalLocations.name: Merchandise Stand A
additionalLocations.details: Largest retail outlet in the arena located near Gate B. Sells official jerseys, flags, scarfs, and custom merchandise.

additionalLocations.name: Merchandise Stand B
additionalLocations.details: Secondary souvenirs counter located near Section 204. Perfect for upper level ticket holders looking to bypass main floor queues.

additionalLocations.name: Lost & Found
additionalLocations.details: Central guest services and lost & found office located inside the Gate A main lobby. Open up to 1 hour after matches.

additionalLocations.name: Bike Racks Area
additionalLocations.details: Complimentary secured bicycle lock station situated right outside Gate B Metro Exit. Highly monitored by transit security.

additionalLocations.name: Taxi Dropoff Zone
additionalLocations.details: Dedicated pick-up and drop-off lane situated opposite Gate A parking lanes. Coordinates directly with ride-share applications.

additionalLocations.name: ATM Terminal West
additionalLocations.details: Multi-bank ATM withdrawal terminal situated near the Gate D concourse corridor. Accepts all major debit and credit cards.

additionalLocations.name: Water Hydration Station
additionalLocations.details: Complimentary filtered chilled water bottle refill station located directly next to the Section 110 restrooms.
